title: Create: Easy Stock Ticker
description: Adds extra features to the stock ticker's inputs to improve ease of use
body:
# Easy stock ticker
![Ez stock ticker banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14f4cdf8949dc477a6990d7529b689a28a38a72b.png)
Improves the input handling of the stock ticker, reducing the time to get what you want and in the right amounts,

## Input changes
- Search bar will automatically select as you open the menu
- Shift and control scroll will snap to 16 or 10 item increments respectivley
- Right click now has unique functionality, it will divide the requested amount by 2,
- Scrolling will no longer delete the stack if you scroll past 1, you will just have to left click to remove

## Only requires client side
Free to use on any create server, all changes happen within the client

## Optional!
Designed to be included in modpacks, so it is easy to toggle on / off within the stock keeper menu, no harm done.

# Please use Modrinth ❤️
Unlike CurseForge, Modrinth shares more with creators, is open source and is a more community driven platform, notably, it has no ties we are uncomfortable with. Mods will continue to be on Curseforge, but a portion of our revenue goes towards Medical Aid for Palestinians.
